basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Group A & B Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 47 Security Officer, Assistant Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh, Uttarakhand - 249203
basic_details.total_vacancies: 47 (tentative, liable to change based on Institute's requirements)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline, prescribed Proforma (Annexure-A), through proper channel
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh released a notification dated 21.07.2026 inviting applications from suitable candidates to fill 27 posts (a total of 47 vacancies) in Group 'A' and Group 'B' categories, purely on deputation basis. This AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment 2026 notification covers posts ranging from Medical Superintendent to Pharmacist Grade I. Below is the complete notification content along with post-wise eligibility, pay scale, age limit, required documents, and the application process.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Not specified as an exact date in the notification; stated as "within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News"

age_limit.details: Medical Superintendent: Maximum 58 years All other 26 posts: Maximum 56 years | Age is calculated as on the last date of receipt of application forms (exact calendar date not specified in the source notification).

qualification.details: All 27 posts are open only to serving government employees eligible for deputation. Eligibility differs by post, based on parent cadre, grade pay, and years of regular service, as detailed below.

vacancy_details.Name of Post: Finance and Chief Accounts Officer (Senior Accounts Officer)

post_wise_breakdown.name_of_post: Finance and Chief Accounts Officer (Senior Accounts Officer)

selection_process: Applications are screened based on the bio-data/CV submitted through proper channel. AIIMS Rishikesh will shortlist eligible candidates who may be called for an interview. Shortlisted candidates must produce all relevant original documents as proof of the details furnished in their application at the time of interview/selection. Meeting the minimum qualification/eligibility criteria does not automatically guarantee selection for interview.
how_to_apply: Fill the application in the prescribed Proforma given as Annexure-A in the official notification.
Attach attested copies of all relevant certificates along with the required documents listed above.
Forward the application through proper channel (i.e., through the applicant's current employer/department), not directly by the candidate.
Superscribe the envelope with: "Application for the post of …………. on deputation basis."
Send the application only by Speed Post or Registered Post to the address below.
Recruitment Cell, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, Pin - 249203
important_instructions: The number of vacancies can be decreased or cancelled, before or after the interview, without assigning any reason, and no intimation will be given for the same. The period of deputation shall initially be for 3 years, as per DoPT norms/Government of India rules. The deputation will be governed by the standard terms and conditions specified in the Department of Personnel & Training's O.M. No. 6/8/2009-Estt. (Pay II) dated 17.06.2010, as amended from time to time. The qualification/eligibility prescribed is the minimum requirement and does not automatically make a candidate eligible for selection. Departments forwarding applications must verify that the candidate's particulars are correct and that they fulfil the eligibility conditions before forwarding.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The text below reproduces the complete content of the official notification issued by AIIMS Rishikesh, exactly as published, for candidates who want the full official wording in one place. "The applications are invited in the prescribed format from suitable candidates for filling up the following Group 'A' & 'B' posts on DEPUTATION BASIS in All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh, 249203. The essential qualifications, experiences, etc. required for applying for the post are as under.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: "* Number of posts is tentative and is liable to change based on Institute's requirements."

rows.name_of_post: Finance and Chief Accounts Officer (Senior Accounts Officer)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Post-Wise Eligibility & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: All 27 posts are open only to serving government employees eligible for deputation. Eligibility differs by post, based on parent cadre, grade pay, and years of regular service, as detailed below. A medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule, or Part II of the Third Schedule, to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 (candidates with Part II/Third Schedule qualifications must also satisfy Section 13(3) of the Act). A postgraduate qualification such as MD/MS or an equivalent recognized qualification, OR M.H.A. (Masters in Hospital Administration) or an equivalent PG degree recognized by the Medical Council of India. Experience: 10 years' experience in Hospital Administration after obtaining the PG degree, in a senior position, preferably in a hospital with 300 beds. Officers from Ministries/Departments of the Government of India, State Government, Union Territories, Statutory or Autonomous Bodies, holding an analogous post on regular basis, or a post with Grade Pay of Rs. 6600 and above, with 5 years of regular service in that grade. Officers holding an analogous post on regular basis, or with 5 years of regular service in PB-3 + GP 5400, and possessing BE/B.Tech/MCA/BSc with a Diploma in Computer Application plus 10 years' experience in IT systems, networking, hardware configuration or software programming in government departments/statutory/autonomous bodies. Officers under Central/State Government, UT Administrations, or Central Statutory/Autonomous Bodies holding an analogous post, or with at least 5 years of regular service with Grade Pay of Rs. 5400, and 5 years' experience as a Stores Officer on regular basis. Officers holding an analogous post on regular basis, OR 5 years of regular service as Senior Dietician (Assistant Foods Manager) in GP Rs. 5400, OR 7 years of regular service as Dietician in GP Rs. 4600. Employees holding an analogous post, or with 5 years' regular service in GP Rs. 5400, and possessing an M.A. in Social Work/MSW from a recognized institute/university with not less than 5 years' experience in medical social welfare, including knowledge of government-run financial aid schemes. Architects, or officers in an equivalent grade in CPWD, possessing a Degree in Architecture with not less than 5 years' experience in the line. If suitable CPWD officers are unavailable, similar officers from other Central Government departments, Central Autonomous/Statutory Bodies, or PSUs may be considered. Officers under Central/State/UT Governments, Universities, Statutory/Autonomous Bodies, or R&D Organizations holding an analogous post, or with 5 years' regular service in the relevant field in GP Rs. 5400. Officers from Ministries/Departments of the Government of India, CPWD, MES, BRO, DoT, State/UT Engineering Services, or other Central/State/PSU/Statutory/Autonomous engineering departments, holding an analogous post; OR in PB-3 GP 5400 with 5 years' regular service; OR in PB-2 GP 4600 with 7 years' regular service. content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Medical Superintendent: Maximum 58 years All other 26 posts: Maximum 56 years Age is calculated as on the last date of receipt of application forms (exact calendar date not specified in the source notification).

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale

rows.applicable_posts: Senior Programmer, Senior Procurement-cum-Stores Officer, Chief Dietician, Chief Medical Social Service Officer, Hospital Architect, Senior Accounts Officer, Finance & Chief Accounts Officer, Executive Engineer (AC&R), Executive Engineer (Electrical)
Chief Medical Record Officer, Supervising Medical Social Service Officer, Security Officer, Accounts Officer, Stores Officer

Assistant Accounts Officer, Senior Sanitation Officer, Assistant Stores Officer, Private Secretary, Assistant Engineer (Vigilance Cell-Civil), Manager/Supervisor/Gas Officer, CSSD Supervisor, Chief Pharmacist
Senior Pharmacist, Pharmacist Grade I, Sanitation Officer

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications are screened based on the bio-data/CV submitted through proper channel. AIIMS Rishikesh will shortlist eligible candidates who may be called for an interview. Shortlisted candidates must produce all relevant original documents as proof of the details furnished in their application at the time of interview/selection. Meeting the minimum qualification/eligibility criteria does not automatically guarantee selection for interview.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for AIIMS Rishikesh Deputation Application
content_sections.text: Duly attested photocopies of Confidential Reports (CRs) of the applicant for the last five years. Vigilance Clearance Certificate, duly signed by an authorized officer, clearly stating that no disciplinary or criminal proceedings are pending or contemplated against the officer. Latest Salary Slip mentioning designation, grade pay, and pay level. A statement showing minor/major penalties imposed on the officer, if any. An Integrity Certificate for the officer recommended for deputation. Important: Applications received without Vigilance Clearance and attested CR Dossiers will not be considered. Applications not routed through the proper channel will also not be considered for interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the application in the prescribed Proforma given as Annexure-A in the official notification. Attach attested copies of all relevant certificates along with the required documents listed above. Forward the application through proper channel (i.e., through the applicant's current employer/department), not directly by the candidate. Superscribe the envelope with: "Application for the post of …………. on deputation basis." Send the application only by Speed Post or Registered Post to the address below. Recruitment Cell, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, Pin - 249203

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The number of vacancies can be decreased or cancelled, before or after the interview, without assigning any reason, and no intimation will be given for the same. The period of deputation shall initially be for 3 years, as per DoPT norms/Government of India rules. The deputation will be governed by the standard terms and conditions specified in the Department of Personnel & Training's O.M. No. 6/8/2009-Estt. (Pay II) dated 17.06.2010, as amended from time to time. The qualification/eligibility prescribed is the minimum requirement and does not automatically make a candidate eligible for selection. Departments forwarding applications must verify that the candidate's particulars are correct and that they fulfil the eligibility conditions before forwarding.

faq.question: Q1. What is the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 deputation notification about?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh has invited applications, dated 21.07.2026, to fill 27 Group A and Group B posts (47 vacancies in total) purely on deputation basis, including Medical Superintendent, Executive Engineers, Pharmacists, Accounts Officers, and more.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh deputation posts 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an exact last date; it states that applications must be received within 45 days from the date of publication in Employment News. Candidates should verify the exact date from the Employment News issue or the AIIMS Rishikesh website.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh deputation vacancies?
faq.answer: Only serving officers/officials of Central Government, State Government, Union Territories, Statutory or Autonomous Bodies, PSUs, Universities, or R&D organizations who meet the post-specific eligibility (analogous post or required years of regular service) can apply, and only through proper channel.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 58 years for the post of Medical Superintendent and 56 years for all other posts, as on the last date of receipt of application.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply directly to AIIMS Rishikesh without going through my department?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that applications received without being forwarded through proper channel will not be considered for interview.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are mandatory with the AIIMS Rishikesh deputation application?
faq.answer: Attested CR dossiers of the last 5 years, a Vigilance Clearance Certificate, latest salary slip, a statement of penalties (if any), and an integrity certificate are mandatory. Applications without Vigilance Clearance and CR dossiers will not be considered.

faq.question: Q7. How should the AIIMS Rishikesh deputation application be sent?
faq.answer: The application must be sent only by Speed Post or Registered Post to the Recruitment Cell, AIIMS Rishikesh, Uttarakhand – 249203, with the envelope superscribed with the post applied for.

faq.question: Q8. Which rules govern the deputation terms for AIIMS Rishikesh posts?
faq.answer: The deputation is governed by the Department of Personnel & Training's O.M. No. 6/8/2009-Estt. (Pay II) dated 17.06.2010, as amended from time to time.
